title: Endless Car Football Game
description: Endless Car Football Game is an exhilarating two-player game designed for computer play. Grab a friend and get ready for some intense car football action! Take control of your vehicles using the arrow keys and compete head-to-head on a never-ending football field. The objective is simple: score as many goals as you can against your opponent. Maneuver your car with precision and speed, strategically positioning yourself for the perfect shot. Use your driving skills to outwit your rival and defend your goal with expert timing. Enjoy the excitement and friendly competition of Endless Car Football Game!
instructions: Player 1 controls the car using the W A S D keys while Player 2 controls their car using the ARROW keys
